style_authority.note: Resolves adaptive product authority and separates shared semantic roles and hierarchy from native navigation, controls, icons, materials, and motion.

reference_selection.note: Selects product, iOS, Android, adaptive, motion-physics, design-system, and validation guidance for platform verdicts, parity, and runtime checks.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust, accessibility, interruption resilience, semantic theming, controls, window adaptation, and completion feedback without generic decoration.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static and states that no source scan, build, screenshot, accessibility tree, Simulator, Emulator, or device validation occurred.

verified_boundary.note: Separates prompt-supported conflicts from unknown hit regions, contrast, accessibility traversal, gestures, persistence, performance, store review, and hardware feel.

design_moves.note: Provides eight moves for native navigation, recovery, scalable type, accessible targets and traversal, semantic tokens, controls, adaptive panes, and reduced motion.

scope_control.note: Fits 112 lines with five blockers and eight moves; one point is withheld because checkpoint and outbox architecture slightly extends beyond the narrow UI-conformance scope.
